name: Turuiemon

signature_move.name: Gauntlet
signature_move.description: A striking technique using the "Tokaku Tessou" on both of its arms, it is a combo-attack technique unleashed with a great leap and rabbit-like agility.

description: A martial artist Digimon discovered within the hinterlands of a Chinese mountain province. It wandered the world in pursuit of its mortal enemy, the viruses that exploit e-mails to do evil. Although it is blessed with exceptional potential for Ch'uan Fa , it is still developing its skills. It practices Togaken , a style it invented itself. Its Signature Move is a quick and stealthy Ch'uan Fa which capitalizes on its great leaping power ( Ninjinken ) [N 1] . Its Special Move is a striking technique using the " Tokaku Tessou " [N 2] on both of its arms ( Gauntlet ). It is a combo-attack technique unleashed with a great leap and rabbit-like agility.
